title: HypurrCo AMAs: Hyperlend - What’s Coming?
summary_title: HyperLend brings Aave's battle-tested lending to Hyperliquid EVM
summary_description: Money market fork licensed by Aave, audited three times, enabling looping strategies and perpetual positions as collateral.

key_moments.label: Hyper Collective intro: validators, events, content
Ness introduces HyperLend: Aave fork on Hyperliquid EVM mainnet
HyperLend vision: banking infrastructure for Hyperliquid EVM
Current collateral: staked Hype, Hype, units BTC; planning USDC, USDT, kHype
Looping strategy: 40% APY on staked Hype via borrow-swap loop
Roadmap: liquid perpetual positions and liquid HLP vault
Points program mirrors Hyperliquid: early TVL deposits rewarded more
Competitive edge: officially Aave-licensed, three audits, MakerDAO risk team
